remember: Students will be able to list and describe common injuries and illnesses in sports.
Students will be able to identify and explain the importance of prevention and first aid in sports.
Students will be able to recall the role of sports medicine in promoting healthy lifestyles and preventing injuries.
understand: Students will be able to explain the causes and consequences of common sports-related injuries and illnesses.
Students will be able to describe the role of sports medicine in providing medical care and support to athletes.
Students will be able to understand the importance of injury prevention and management in sports.
apply: Students will be able to apply knowledge of sports medicine to prevent and treat common injuries and illnesses.
Students will be able to design and implement a plan for injury prevention and management in a sports setting.
Students will be able to provide first aid and basic medical care to athletes in a sports setting.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the causes and consequences of common sports-related injuries and illnesses.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of injury prevention and management strategies in sports.
Students will be able to identify and describe the role of sports medicine in promoting healthy lifestyles and preventing injuries.

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of sports medicine in promoting healthy lifestyles and preventing injuries.
To describe the role of sports medicine in providing medical care and support to athletes.
To explain the causes and consequences of common sports-related injuries and illnesses.
board_exam_objectives: To identify and explain the importance of prevention and first aid in sports.
To describe the role of sports medicine in providing medical care and support to athletes.
To apply knowledge of sports medicine to prevent and treat common injuries and illnesses.
